_confidence_calc.battle_grade_rationale: 672.5 is the 5-day RTH rolling high — price touched it from below in a prior session and reversed (hence it became the 5-day high); classified as HELD per v5 rubric

dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Internals cites clear risk-off rotation (XLK -0.33%, XLF -0.43% — two largest SPY weightings rolling over premarket) while Macro votes no_trade on neutral VIX with no events scheduled; both agents undermine the bullish structural thesis from technical and level_thesis.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: CLEAN_BULL ribbon without price conviction — price only 2 cents above pivot with chop bar pattern (RED-GREEN-RED) and premarket demonstrated 76-cent seller-dominated washout (672.95 → 672.19); ribbon alignment is infrastructure, not execution proof.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: XLK reverses and rallies >+0.50% within first 15 minutes of RTH (tech institutional bid-in collapses the risk-off rotation narrative and validates bullish ribbon)

primary.condition: if SPY reclaims and holds above 672.5 (Carry resist) with sustained 5m bar close above and volume expansion

secondary.condition: if SPY loses 672.07 (PML) on a 5m close below with ribbon stack inverting south

invalidation.condition: XLK rallies >+0.50% within first 15 minutes of RTH (tech institutional bid reversal within 09:30-09:45 ET)
invalidation.effect: Risk-off rotation narrative collapses; bullish ribbon structure thesis strengthens materially — Carry 672.5 reclaim becomes a higher-conviction entry if ribbon holds and price sustains above pivot

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY tests Carry resistance 672.5 within the first 60 minutes of RTH (at or above 672.45 by 10:30 ET)
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY does not reach 672.40 by 10:30 ET

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains contained within 15.5–17.5 for the full session — clean macro calendar with no external expansion catalyst means no volatility breakout above 17.5
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX touches 17.6 or higher at any point during RTH

swarm_predictions.claim: BULL ribbon fails to generate a clean directional impulse early session — SPY closes below fast EMA (672.25) on the 10:00 ET 5m bar close as premarket seller momentum carries into open
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY bar close at 10:00 ET is at or above 672.25

synthesis_narrative: The swarm sees a structurally bullish setup (CLEAN_BULL ribbon 28c spread, level_thesis 0.72 confidence) that is blocked from a directional signal by three simultaneous headwinds: a 76-cent premarket seller washout, risk-off sector rotation in XLK+XLF (~45% of SPY by weight), and only 2 of 4 specialists aligned bullish. With an HELD battle level at 672.5 and the v5 confidence formula producing raw 11 (well below the 40-point NO_TRADE floor), the swarm abstains from a directional call. The single most critical variable at the open is whether the premarket low (672.07) holds as a base or sellers drive through it toward 671.57 — that binary will determine which scenario map arm activates first.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BULL ribbon (fast 672.25 > pivot 672.17 > slow 671.96, 28c spread) undermined by chop bar structure and 76-cent premarket seller washout leaving price at pivot equilibrium

macro.one_line: VIX 16.31 MID flat, zero events on calendar, neutral +$0.41 overnight gap — backdrop calm but risk-off sector rotation adds caution

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 672.5 (Carry 2★ resistance) just 31 cents overhead with test imminent; support layered at PML 672.07 then 671.57 — reactive open expected from 92-cent compressed range

internals.one_line: Risk-off rotation: XLK -0.33% and XLF -0.43% premarket — both largest SPY weightings rolling over despite flat SPY gap, narrow leadership signaling downside intraday pressure

validator.top_invalidation: XLK +0.50% reversal within first 15 min of RTH collapses the risk-off rotation narrative and validates the bullish ribbon structure case
